title: Tens of thousands rally in Prague to protest new PM Andrej Babis
description: Tens of thousands of people protested in Prague on Saturday against the policies and plans of the new Czech government led by populist Prime Minister Andrej Babis. The protesters from across the Czech Republic attended the peaceful demonstration at Letná park, the scene of huge gatherings in 1989 that greatly contributed to the fall of communism.

title: Ex-FBI director Robert Mueller, who investigated Russia-Trump campaign ties, dies aged 81
description: Robert S. Mueller III, the FBI director who transformed the nation's premier law enforcement agency into a terrorism-fighting force after the Sept. 11, 2001, attacks and who later became special counsel in charge of investigating ties between Russia and Donald Trump's presidential campaign, has died. He was 81.

description: French voters returned to the polls Sunday for the second and final round of municipal elections in over 1,500 communes. description: The U.S. military said it had substantially degraded Tehran’s fighting power, attacking 8,000 targets so far. But on Saturday, both the United States and Britain said Iran had tried to strike a faraway joint base.

title: For generations of Judy Blume fans, long-awaited biography does not disappoint
description:
Realistic kids' and teen fiction pioneer introduced readers to relatable characters and plots, not to mention unforgettable lines like, 'We must, we must, we must increase our bust!'

title: Wave of executions feared in Iran as authorities hang 3 young men nabbed in protests
description:
Rights groups say victims include star wrestler, 19, who said in court he was tortured into confessing to killing a cop during regime's brutal crackdown in January

title: Hezbollah rockets damage buildings in north as IDF strikes Lebanon, kills gunmen
description:
Homes hit in Metula and Safed, but none hurt; army says soldiers operating across the border exchanged fire with terror operatives, killing several

title: Iranian-backed militias escalate attacks in Iraq, send mixed signals on next steps
description:
Iranian-backed militias have continued conducting attacks across Iraq, recently targeting US and foreign diplomatic sites in Baghdad and Erbil. Hundreds of strikes have hit the Kurdistan Region since late February, wounding Peshmerga forces and damaging key locations. While Kataib Hezbollah signaled a possible temporary pause in attacks tied to specific demands on March 18, other groups, such as Kataib Sayyid al Shuhada, vowed to continue. 
The p

title: Analysis: West Bloomfield terror attack highlights Hezbollah connections within Shiite Lebanese community in US
description:
Last week, Ayman Mohamad Ghazali, a Lebanese-US dual national, rammed his car into the entrance of Temple Israel, a synagogue in West Bloomfield, Indiana. Ghazali had familial connections to Hezbollah, and evidence shows multiple connections to the US-designated terrorist group among Shiite Lebanese expatriates, including open support for Hezbollah by some individuals within these communities.

title: Iranian drones and missiles hit regional oil fields, airports, military bases, and ports (March 13-16 updates)
description:
Between March 13 and March 16, Iran and its allied militias continued launching drones, missiles, rockets, and other attack platforms across the Middle East, targeting energy infrastructure, airports, military bases, residential areas, diplomatic facilities, and oil fields. 
The post Iranian drones and missiles hit regional oil fields, airports, military bases, and ports (March 13-16 updates) appeared first on FDDs Long War Journal.

title: Texelis, Scata team up on medium-heavy vehicle that can do drone defense
description: The 18-ton vehicle, named the MK1, was developed in less than a year and is envisioned as a multirole platform incorporating lessons from the Ukraine war.

title: USS Boxer and 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit deploy to Middle East
description: The Pentagon is deploying thousands of additional Marines and sailors to the Middle East.

title: Iran war is not delaying US weapons shipments to Taiwan, officials say
description: The Iran war has not delayed shipments of weapons to Taiwan, Trump administration officials said Tuesday, despite the demands of the intense air campaign.

title: War in the Middle East: Israel launches fresh strikes on Beirut
description: Renée Davis is live from Beirut.
